profiles.import_firefox_policies_ready: Choose a Firefox policies.json file. Import creates a new profile in the library.
profiles.library_export_unavailable_arch: Restore this archived profile before export.
profiles.clone_handoff_title: Recommended checks for this derived draft
profiles.clone_handoff_body: When you start from an existing profile, review the areas most likely to change in this variant before saving it as a separate profile.
profiles.clone_handoff_active: This draft starts from {name}. Review the most likely variant-specific areas below before saving or handing it off.
profiles.clone_handoff_item_identity: Rename the draft and update the owner or description for this variant.
profiles.clone_handoff_item_home: Review homepage, startup flow, and visible browser surfaces for this variant.
profiles.clone_handoff_item_privacy: Review privacy, cleanup, and site-permission posture for this variant.
profiles.clone_handoff_item_features: Review add-ons, languages, site access, and other managed browser surfaces.
profiles.clone_handoff_item_compare: Compare this draft against the source profile {name}.
profiles.lifecycle_review_body: This view shows the latest trustworthy lifecycle markers we know for the current profile or draft.
profiles.lifecycle_review_active: Use these markers to verify where this profile came from, when it was last saved, and whether it is active or archived now.
profiles.lifecycle_item_created_draft: This draft has not been saved yet.
profiles.lifecycle_item_saved_draft: There is no saved version yet.
profiles.lifecycle_item_state_saved: This saved profile is currently active.
profiles.lifecycle_item_state_clone_draf: This is a draft based on another saved profile.
profiles.library_compare_body: Select any two saved profiles in the library and review their differences side by side.
profiles.library_compare_empty_body: Select any two saved profiles in the library to compare them side by side.
profiles.library_compare_empty_pick_firs: Select the first saved profile in the library to start a comparison.
profiles.library_compare_empty_pick_seco: First profile selected: {name}. Select a second saved profile to review the differences.
profiles.library_compare_saved_copy: Saved profile from the library. Schema: {schema}.
profiles.library_compare_changes_active: Top differences between the selected profiles.
profiles.compare_body: Review one saved profile against the currently open setup through the same canonical profile snapshot.
profiles.compare_empty_body: Open one profile, then choose Compare on another saved profile from the library.
profiles.compare_empty_need_base: Open a saved profile first, then choose another one from the library to compare it side by side.
profiles.compare_empty_pick_other: Choose Compare on another saved profile from the library to review the differences here.
profiles.compare_empty_invalid: Fix invalid policies.json in the current profile file before running a comparison.
profiles.compare_current_saved_copy: Open profile, including any unsaved edits. Schema: {schema}.
profiles.compare_other_copy: Saved profile from the library. Schema: {schema}.
profiles.compare_changes_body: This list stays short on purpose and shows the first meaningful areas that differ.
profiles.compare_changes_active: Top differences between the current setup and the selected profile.
profiles.compare_changes_none: Both profiles currently match in metadata, policies, and preferences.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_body: This view groups differences by wizard areas so it is easier to see which part of the setup changed most.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_active: The biggest differences below are grouped by guided wizard area.
profiles.compare_guided_areas_none: There are no guided-area differences to review.
profiles.clone_meta: Draft based on {name}. Save it as a separate profile when you are ready.
profiles.library_status_compare_first_se: Selected {name} as the first profile for comparison.
